title: enrich.put_policy

name.description: Name of the enrich policy to create or update.

master_timeout.description: Period to wait for a connection to the master node.

geo_match.description: Matches enrich data to incoming documents based on a `geo_shape` query.

match.description: Matches enrich data to incoming documents based on a `term` query.

range.description: Matches a number, date, or IP address in incoming documents to a range in the enrich index based on a `term` query.

description:
Create an enrich policy.

Creates an enrich policy.
